title: I'm Cropdusting
headline: I'm Cropdusting
caption: Some shirts ask for subtle appreciation. This one announces the bit from across the room. I'm Cropdusting. https://www.thirdstringshirts.com/shop.html#!/i'm+cropdusting?idea=5d89cc1313615160bf6ec92e #FunnyShirts #FartHumor

title: Coloradans Against Hiking
headline: Coloradans Against Hiking
caption: Not every Colorado hobby needs to become a personality. Coloradans Against Hiking is for the anti-summit constituency. https://www.etsy.com/listing/874967110/coloradans-against-hiking-t-shirt #ColoradansAgainst #ColoradoHumor
alt_text: Coloradans Against Hiking shirt with dry anti-hiking Colorado humor.

title: Ski in your Jeans
headline: Ski in your Jeans
caption: A shirt for people who understand that confidence and poor judgment sometimes share a chairlift. Ski in your Jeans. https://www.thirdstringshirts.com/shop.html#!/ski+in+your+jeans?idea=5d89cbe2162c5f464e735a5f #SkiCulture #FunnyShirts
alt_text: A t-shirt featuring the phrase 'Ski in your Jeans' with a humorous design, aimed at skiers who love a good joke.
